item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 171730Z AUTO 29007KT 250V340 9999 FEW034 BKN076 BKN088 15/09 Q1013 TEMPO 4000 -SHRA SCT030TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 171700Z 1718/1818 28010KT 9999 SCT030 PROB40 TEMPO 1718/1804 4000 -SHRA SCT030TCU BECMG 1806/1808 BKN016 BECMG 1808/1810 BKN030 PROB40 TEMPO 1810/1818 4000 -SHRA SCT025CB
